person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Ranulf de Briquessart (or Ranulf the Viscount) (died c. 1089 or soon after) was an 11th-century Norman magnate and viscount.

«b»Biography«/b»
Ranulf's family were connected to the House of Normandy by marriage, and, besides Odo, bishop of Bayeux, was the most powerful magnate in the Bessin region. He married Margaret, daughter of Richard le Goz, Viscount of Avranches, whose son and successor Hugh d'Avranches became Earl of Chester in England c. 1070.

Ranulf is probably the "Ranulf the viscount" who witnessed a charter of William, Duke of Normandy, at Caen on 17 June 1066.

Ranulf helped preside over a judgement in the curia of King William (as duke) in 1076 in which a disputed mill was awarded to the Abbey of Mont St. Michael. On 14 July 1080 he witnessed a charter to the Abbey of Lessay (in the diocese of Coutances), another in the same year addressed to Remigius de Fécamp bishop of Lincoln in favour of the Abbey of Préaux. and one more in the same period, 1079 x 1082, to the Abbey of St Stephen of Caen. His name is attached to a memorandum in 1085, and on 24 April 1089 he witnessed a confirmation of Robert Curthose, Duke of Normandy and Count of Maine to St Mary of Bayeaux, where he appears below his son in the witness list.

He certainly died sometime after this. His son Ranulf le Meschin became ruler of Cumberland and later Earl of Chester. The Durham Liber Vitae, c. 1098 x 1120, shows that his eldest son was one Richard, who died in youth, and that he had another son named William. He also had a daughter called Agnes, who later married Robert (III) de Grandmesnil (died 1136).

zh.lifeSummary: 當Ranulf de Briquessart於大約1047年出生在法國諾門迪時，他的父親Ranulph de Bayeux Vicomte du Bessin31歲，母親Adelize Normandie Comtesse du Bessin27歲。他和Marguerite d'Avranches至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於大約1089年在英國爾切斯特享年44歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾切斯特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ranulf
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old Norse personal name, Reginulfr, derived from regin ‘advice, decision’ + úlfr ‘wolf’. This was introduced into Scotland and northern England by Scandinavian settlers in the early Middle Ages and modern use is largely confined to these areas.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

en.lifeSummary: When Ranulf de Briquessart was born about 1047, in Normandy, France, his father, Ranulph de Bayeux Vicomte du Bessin, was 31 and his mother, Adelize Normandie Comtesse du Bessin, was 27. He had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with Marguerite d'Avranches. He died about 1089, in Chester, Cheshire, England, at the age of 44, and was buried in Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ranulf de Briquessart est né environ 1047, à Normandie, France, son père, Ranulph de Bayeux Vicomte du Bessin, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Adelize Normandie Comtesse du Bessin, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille avec Marguerite d'Avranches. Il est décédé environ 1089, à Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ranulf de Briquessart um 1047 in Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ranulph de Bayeux Vicomte du Bessin 31 und seine Mutter Adelize Normandie Comtesse du Bessin 27. Er hatte mit Marguerite d'Avranches mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1089 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Chester, Cheshire, England und wurde in Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ranulf de Briquessart è nato il circa 1047 nel Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Ranulph de Bayeux Vicomte du Bessin, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Adelize Normandie Comtesse du Bessin, aveva 27 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia con Marguerite d'Avranches. Morì circa 1089, nel Chester, Cheshire, England, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Chester, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Ranulf de Briquessartが約1047年にフランスノーマンディで生まれた時，父Ranulph de Bayeux Vicomte du Bessinは31歳，母Adelize Normandie Comtesse du Bessinは27歳であった。彼はMarguerite d'Avranchesとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1089年にイギリスチェシュアイアチェスターで44歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアチェスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ranulf de Briquessart(이)가 대략 1047년 프랑스 노먼디에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ranulph de Bayeux Vicomte du Bessin(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelize Normandie Comtesse du Bessin(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Marguerite d'Avranches(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1089년 영국 체실르 체스터에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 체스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ranulf de Briquessart nasceu aproximadamente 1047, em Normandie, França, seu pai, Ranulph de Bayeux Vicomte du Bessin, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Adelize Normandie Comtesse du Bessin, tinha 27 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha com Marguerite d'Avranches. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1089, em Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ranulf de Briquessart родился около 1047 г. в местности норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Ranulph de Bayeux Vicomte du Bessin было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Adelize Normandie Comtesse du Bessin, 27. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь от Marguerite d'Avranches. Он умер около 1089 г. в местности честир, чешир, Англия в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности честир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

sm.about 1047–about 1089: e tusa o le 1047–e tusa o le 1089

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ranulf de Briquessart nació aproximadamente 1047, en Normandie, Francia, su papá, Ranulph de Bayeux Vicomte du Bessin, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Adelize Normandie Comtesse du Bessin, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija con Marguerite d'Avranches. Murió aproximadamente 1089, en Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultado en Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
